title: StartupTime Unoffical
description: Displays startup time after game finished loading.
body:
一个简单的模组，在游戏启动完成后显示本次启动所用的时间。\
**A simple mod, after the game is started, shows the time spent in this startup.**
![-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e5c8c24df092ad61aed8ecafa3172fccf261e86.png)
